page_content:
Restriction: Freshman standing.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

UNIV399 Experiential Learning in Undergraduate Studies (1-3 Credits) Experiential learning offered in conjunction with certain designated Office of Undergraduate Studies programs.

Restriction: Must have a Learning proposal approved by the Office of Undergraduate Studies and student's internship sponsor; and junior standing or higher.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
